title: Xp Formula
description: Tweak the experience required for leveling up.
body:
In vanllia Minecraft, the higher the level, the more experience is required to level up, while enchanting consumes experience levels rather than experience points. Therefore, enchanting becomes less worthwhile as levels increase.

This mod allows you to tweak the experience formula, adjusting the experience required for leveling up. By adjusting the configuration, you can set the experience required for leveling up to a constant value after reaching a certain level, or even make the experience required for leveling up decrease over time.
